testcase.name: testLogin on testLogin(com.jobportal.tests.ui.RegisterUITest)
testcase.system-out: Browser opened: ChromeDriver Navigated to: http://localhost:3000 Clicked Login link Login form loaded Entered email: leethakare69@gmail.com Entered password Clicked Submit button Current URL after login: http://localhost:3000/login ✓ Login Test Passed Browser closed
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. May 22, 2026 6:21:17 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 148 May 22, 2026 6:21:17 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 148.0.7778.179. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
